title: Mannarino sets French grass record as he downs Zhang to reach ‘s-Hertogenbosch semi-finals
description: The 37-year-old left-hander beat Zhizhen Zhang 7-6(4), 6-3 to reach his first grass-court semi-final since 2023, claiming a 76th tour-level win on the surface to pass Richard Gasquet as the most prolific French player on grass in the Open era. He next faces Alex de Minaur.

title: A step forward, not a blank cheque: players respond to Wimbledon’s record prize money
description: Players have welcomed Wimbledon's record 20% prize money rise as "a genuine and significant step forward" – while calculating that their share of revenues, at 14.4%, remains below its 2015 level. Welfare, revenue formula and representation stay unresolved.

title: “First, I didn’t believe I’d won”: Zverev on the stress and release of a first major title
description: Tight, unstable and on the edge of physical collapse in the fourth set, Alexander Zverev found an unlikely release in his own cramps: forced to let go, he swung freely to claim, at last, a first Grand Slam title. On court, the German did not at first believe he had won.

title: The list Zverev just escaped: the 12 best players of the Open era never to win a Grand Slam (retired)
description: Tennis Majors takes a closer look at some of the top players who never won a Grand Slam. It is also an opportunity to give them back some of the glory that misfortune has eternally, and more or less unfairly, denied them. Official : Alexander Zverev is not a contender anymore after Roland-Garros 2026.

title: “A churning stomach I don’t usually have”: the stress, and the wonder, of Flavio Cobolli’s first Grand Slam final
description: n his first Grand Slam final, Flavio Cobolli experienced everything for the first time: the churning stomach on waking, the retreat into isolation before walking on court, then a five-set defeat to his friend Alexander Zverev. At 23, the Italian chooses to see a beginning.

title: “My body left me on the court”: Flavio Cobolli’s first Grand Slam final undone by cramp
description: Betrayed by cramp in a fifth set he entered already spent, Flavio Cobolli lost the Roland-Garros final to his friend Alexander Zverev. At 23, in his first Grand Slam final, the Italian had no trouble conceding that the title belonged to the German.

title: “At the end of the day, we’re Grand Slam champions”: Zverev wins his first major title at the fourth attempt, beating Cobolli in five sets at Roland-Garros
description: Alexander Zverev (No 2) beat Flavio Cobolli (No 10) 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7(5), 6-1 on Court Philippe-Chatrier, to win his first Grand Slam title at the fourth attempt, and the first major won by a German man since Boris Becker at the 1996 Australian Open.

title: Team Social Evening
description: A good night of tennis and food was had at our team social night this November, Over 35 players took part in our beat our pro Tennis players and coach led drills night. Followed by drinks and homemade pizza, thanks to all who took part. The post Team Social Evening appeared first on Chandos Lawn Tennis Club .

title: Club Finals Sunday 20th October Results and Review
description: Club Tournament 2024 Review 159 Players took part, 200 matches played, 16 events, 170 matches WINNERS AND REVIEW LINK [metaslider id=”6831″] The post Club Finals Sunday 20th October Results and Review appeared first on Chandos Lawn Tennis Club .

title: Women’s First Team Win Middlesex Premier League East
description: Great job by our Women's team to capture a first Middlesex Premier League East title in many years winning a group division of 7 excellent teams. The team were undefeated all season and came home with a very high average sets and match score . They will now compete in a Play of against the Premier League West Winners Campden Hill for the overall title scheduled for 22 September from 1:00pm. A big thanks to all the players who took part. title: Members Organise Community Grass Roots Programme
description: Members have brought their love of the game to help support and create a grass roots scheme bringing tennis to children alongside the Jason Roberts Foundation . Our members Geoffrey , Leeta, Yamile , Olga and Gaby all volunteer regularly and our coaches Ken and Emilia have also been involved in promoting tennis with the Continue Reading The post Members Organise Community Grass Roots Programme appeared first on Chandos Lawn Tennis Club .

title: Teams Compete Well In The Worldpay National Premier League Finals
description: A great effort by both teams who missed out on competing for the National Premier League Doubles Finals title . Our Men lost out in the first round to number 4 seeds Edinburgh by a 3-1 match loss. Great effort by the team to make the Finals for the First time in 4 years. The Continue Reading The post Teams Compete Well In The Worldpay National Premier League Finals appeared first on Chandos Lawn Tennis Club .

title: Kapari Represents in African Games
description: Every couple of years, athletes from various disciplines and specialities train and prepare to capture the chance to compete at the Olympics. As an athlete, there isn't a more eloquent honour than carrying the badge of participating at the Olympics with the colours of your nation adorning you. This year, that chance for some athletes from the African continent was at the 13th All-Africa Games held in Accra.
